other_observers: Gregg Goodrich, Loch Kilpatrick; Randy Seibert found this bird, one or 2 days before my sighting.
specific_location: Barr Lake SP, east of banding station
description: A wood-pewee with a mostly pale lower mandible singing a typical EAWP song repeatedly.Behaviors: Flycatching from high perches. Occasionally chasing other pewees. Singing.Call: peee-a-weee peeeeerPlumage: adult
